title: The UN demands AI accountability while running Google ad-tech on its own website
abstract: The UN demands AI accountability while running Google ad-tech on its own website may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized to...
abstract_zh: 联合国要求AI负责任，自家网站却跑着谷歌广告技术？这波操作真是“表里不一”到极致！不过话说回来，人家目标明确，精准打击，咱也只能佩服它的灵活应变。在快节奏的AI世界里，这种专属性简直让人刮目相看！
